description: T-E-R-Y: Trit, Expertise, Reafference, Yield — per-droid configuration for 26-agent OpenGame orchestration

acronym.T: Trit — GF(3) assignment {-1, 0, +1} determining oppositional bucket
acronym.E: Expertise — domain specialization and non-overlapping mutual information scope
acronym.R: Reafference — coplay feedback mode: how utility propagates backward
acronym.Y: Yield — interaction protocol: what the droid produces on each query

PLUS.play: propose novel meal-delivery chains, favor human-in-loop, maximize quality

ERGODIC.play: benchmark approaches, measure cost/quality tradeoffs, validate gay primitives
ERGODIC.coplay: reward accuracy, penalize bias in either direction

MINUS.play: attack proposed chains, find failure modes, minimize unnecessary cost
MINUS.coplay: reward finding flaws, penalize false confidence

information_hiding.rule: Each bucket sees only its own internal state + the final outputs of other buckets
information_hiding.mutual_information: I(bucket_i ; bucket_j | public_output) = 0 for i != j
information_hiding.revelation: Full state merges only in final battle comparison phase
